evals.prompt: /gh-create-issue add a way to see which members don't have any posts assigned on the board
evals.expected_output: Well-formed issue draft with all required sections. Should detect potential overlap with issue #93. Should ask clarifying questions about UI approach, scope of 'posts', and whether reserves count.

assertions.name: asked-clarifying-questions
assertions.description: conversation.md contains at least one round of clarifying questions from Claude before the draft is presented

assertions.name: draft-has-required-sections
assertions.description: issue_draft.md contains all of: Summary, Acceptance Criteria, and Out of Scope sections

assertions.name: existing-issues-searched
assertions.description: investigation_notes.md mentions checking GitHub issues or lists specific existing issues that were found

assertions.name: draft-includes-label-suggestion
assertions.description: issue_draft.md recommends at least one specific label (e.g. enhancement, bug)

assertions.name: overlap-with-93-considered
assertions.description: investigation_notes.md or conversation.md mentions issue #93 and assesses whether it overlaps with this request

assertions.name: board-files-investigated
assertions.description: investigation_notes.md references at least one specific frontend file related to the board (e.g. BoardPage.tsx, MemberBucket)

assertions.name: scope-of-posts-clarified
assertions.description: conversation.md shows Claude asked about what 'posts' means (all positions vs Posts tab specifically) or where on the UI the feature should appear

evals.prompt: /gh-create-issue the bot isn't sending notifications to members who have the reserve flag set
evals.expected_output: Well-formed bug report. Should investigate bot/ directory. Should note relationship to #111 (reserve flag logic). Should ask clarifying questions about expected behavior and reproduction.

assertions.name: asked-clarifying-questions
assertions.description: conversation.md contains at least one round of clarifying questions from Claude before the draft is presented

assertions.name: draft-has-required-sections
assertions.description: issue_draft.md contains all of: Summary, Acceptance Criteria, and Out of Scope sections

assertions.name: existing-issues-searched
assertions.description: investigation_notes.md mentions checking GitHub issues or lists specific existing issues that were found

assertions.name: draft-includes-label-suggestion
assertions.description: issue_draft.md recommends at least one specific label (e.g. enhancement, bug)

assertions.name: bot-directory-investigated
assertions.description: investigation_notes.md references specific files inside the bot/ directory or mentions bot-specific notification code

assertions.name: reserve-flag-issue-111-noted
assertions.description: investigation_notes.md or conversation.md mentions issue #111 as related (both involve the reserve flag)

assertions.name: bug-report-format
assertions.description: issue_draft.md uses bug report framing: describes current (broken) behavior vs expected behavior, not just a feature description

evals.prompt: [Blank invoke] User then says: I want to restrict who can publish a siege — only Officers and Leaders should be able to do it
evals.expected_output: Should ask for description first. Then detect direct overlap with #51 which explicitly mentions role-based access as future work. Should flag this and ask the user how to proceed rather than auto-creating a new issue.

assertions.name: asked-clarifying-questions
assertions.description: conversation.md contains at least one round of clarifying questions from Claude before the draft is presented

assertions.name: draft-has-required-sections
assertions.description: issue_draft.md contains all of: Summary, Acceptance Criteria, and Out of Scope sections (or documents why a new issue wasn't created due to overlap)

assertions.name: existing-issues-searched
assertions.description: investigation_notes.md mentions checking GitHub issues or lists specific existing issues that were found

assertions.name: draft-includes-label-suggestion
assertions.description: issue_draft.md recommends at least one specific label (e.g. enhancement, bug) — or notes that a new issue wasn't created due to overlap with #51

assertions.name: blank-invoke-prompted-for-description
assertions.description: conversation.md shows Claude's first response is a question asking what issue to create (because no description was provided)

assertions.name: overlap-with-51-detected
assertions.description: investigation_notes.md or conversation.md explicitly flags that #51 (Discord OAuth2) mentions role-based access control as future work — not just that auth is a dependency

assertions.name: user-given-choice-on-overlap
assertions.description: conversation.md shows Claude presented the #51 overlap to the user and asked whether to create a new issue, update #51, or link — rather than silently auto-creating a new issue
